LanguageData.AM_BlockedLargeElevator.description: Large elevators that have been abandoned and buried underground facilities are ready to be dismantled at any time.
LanguageData.AM_BlockedLargeElevator.label: Abandoned large elevator
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_LargeElevator.description: A large facility elevator for personnel and vehicles to enter and exit.
LanguageData.AM_Entrance_LargeElevator.label: large facility elevator
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Staircase_LargeElevator.descript: A large facility elevator for personnel and vehicles to enter and exit.
LanguageData.AM_Exit_Staircase_LargeElevator.label: large facility elevator
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorA.description: A large transport elevator used for transporting goods will transport the goods to the linked exit elevator when powered on. Personnel are prohibited from standing!
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorA.label: material elevator
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorB.description: A large elevator used for transporting materials from the entrance to here.
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorB.label: material elevator Outlet
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorC.description: A large transport elevator used for transporting goods will transport the goods to the linked exit elevator when powered on. Personnel are prohibited from standing!
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorC.label: material elevator
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorD.description: A large elevator used for transporting materials from the entrance to here.
LanguageData.AM_MaterialElevatorD.label: material elevator Outlet
